description: Price history is stored indefinitely in context.prices without size bounds.
explanation: The context.prices list grows unbounded throughout the backtest. Over a multi-year backtest, this can cause memory issues. More importantly, old prices from years ago remain in the list and could unintentionally influence calculations. A rolling window (deque with maxlen) ensures only recent data is kept.
suggested_fix: Use collections.deque with maxlen parameter to limit stored history to a fixed window (e.g., 100 days).
